content.text: This looks like a fresh stage — let me check the current cluster state since the image version differs (3.5.2 now).

input.command: kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1; echo "---ROLE---"; kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1
input.description: Check current spark-pi job and role state

apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.2.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.2-nonexistent","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-nonexistent"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:08:14Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-pi
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 9a4f1661-8eb0-4da8-9b30-e4694be732e8
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
    component: driver
    controller-uid: 9a4f1661-8eb0-4da8-9b30-e4694be732e8
    job-name: spark-pi
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "2820550"
  uid: 9a4f1661-8eb0-4da8-9b30-e4694be732e8
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 9a4f1661-8eb0-4da8-9b30-e4694be732e8
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 9a4f1661-8eb0-4da8-9b30-e4694be732e8
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
        component: driver
        controller-uid: 9a4f1661-8eb0-4da8-9b30-e4694be732e8
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.2.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        image: apache/spark:3.5.2-nonexistent
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-submit
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: "512"
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark-nonexistent
      serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  ready: 0
  startTime: "2026-07-10T00:08:14Z"
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}
---ROLE---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Role","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi-role","namespace":"spark-pi"},"rules":[{"apiGroups":[""],"resources":["services","configmaps","persistentvolumeclaims"],"verbs":["create","get","list","watch","delete","update","patch"]}]}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:02:13Z"

content.text: Confirmed: fresh broken job deployed (now using Spark 3.5.2), and the RBAC role already has `pods` from the prior stage fix. I'll create the corrected job manifest and re-apply.

input.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.2
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.2.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never

content.content: File created successfully at: /workspace/spark-pi-job.yaml (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)
